query: SELECT COUNT(*) as col_count FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'services' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('whyProblemExists', 'falseBeliefsVsRealReasons', 'failedSolutions', 'hiddenReasons', 'riskReversal', 'uniqueMechanismSuggestion', 'avatarName', 'avatarTitle');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as col_count FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'services' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('whyProblemExists', 'falseBeliefsVsRealReasons', 'failedSolutions', 'hiddenReasons', 'riskReversal', 'uniqueMechanismSuggestion', 'avatarName', 'avatarTitle');
